name: rocket-launchpad-bsc

scripts.deploy:factory:bsc: npm run hardhat:compile && hardhat run scripts/deploy-factory.cjs --network bsc --no-compile
scripts.deploy:factory:testnet: npm run hardhat:compile && hardhat run scripts/deploy-factory.cjs --network bscTestnet --no-compile
scripts.verify:factory:bsc: npm run patch:hardhat-verify && hardhat verify --network bsc
scripts.verify:factory:testnet: npm run patch:hardhat-verify && hardhat verify --network bscTestnet
scripts.contracts:verify:project: npm run patch:hardhat-verify && npm run verify:project:bsc
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name rocket-launchpad

description: Rocket Launchpad is a BNB Smart Chain mint launchpad built with Vite, React, and Hardhat.
